title: Databank Monkey Test
subtitle: Robustness validation comparing strategy performance against random time-shifted entries.
priceCsvDropText: Drag & drop Price CSV here or click to browse
bulkCsvDropText: Drag & drop Bulk Databank Trades CSV here or click to browse
noCsvUploaded: Please upload the historical price CSV file first.
noStrategySelected: No strategy selected. Click on a strategy in your SQX Databank or select one from the list.
disclaimerHtml: This analysis is provided strictly for informational and educational purposes within StrategyQuant X. It does not constitute financial, investment, or trading advice. All results, including backtests and simulations, are based on historical data and hypothetical performance, which may not reflect future market conditions. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Trading involves substantial risk, and you should conduct your own independent research and consult a licensed financial advisor before making any investment or trading decisions. This tool utilizes statistical math based on historical sequences; actual market execution may vary significantly.
sqxDropText: Drag & drop .sqx files here or click to browse
errSqxNoFiles: Please upload the .sqx files for all strategies.
noMatchingData: No cached Monkey Test data matches this strategy's period. Run the Custom Analysis or click 'Run Monkey Test'.
temporalMismatch: Cached data does not match the current strategy period (strategy may have been re-backtested).
deleteConfirm: Delete cached Monkey Test data for {scope}? This cannot be undone.
cacheWriteManual: Move the downloaded files to the cache/ folder inside the plugin to enable auto-loading.
cacheDeleteUnavailable: File deletion is not available in this SQX version. Delete files manually from the cache/ folder inside the plugin.
saveTestCacheDataTip:
Saves monkey simulation CSV + metadata to disk.
Allows charts to reload without recalculating.
Recommended: .../DatabankMonkeyTest/cache/
